<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user_management/users/{userlandUserId}/auth_factors"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enrolls a user in a new [authentication factor](/reference/authkit/mfa/authentication-factor).
